one_time_description: Land settlement advances received during the year, along with prepaid land settlement costs of $770,142 recorded as non-financial assets
economic_notes: Related party entities include Gambler Resources Limited Partnership, Gambler Gaming Ventures Limited Partnership, Gambler Construction Limited Partnership, Gambler Brandon Ventures Limited Partnership, and Gambler Gas & Convenience Store Limited Partnership. Land claim settlement activity occurred during the year.
notes: 2019 figures are restated due to prior period adjustments of $16,879. The nation consolidated 6 departments/entities. Five limited partnerships are related party entities accounted for outside consolidation. Large deferred revenue of $1,603,560 deferred to subsequent year significantly reduces recognized revenue. Land settlement activity created $989,709 in advances (liability) and $770,142 in prepaid costs (non-financial asset). Expenses total from statement of operations is $2,894,619 plus amortization $140,360. Prior year expenses were $2,905,958 plus amortization $100,055.
